column1: ardeleanul: How is in the States?
Monadology: Hi, let's have have a good game.
ardeleanul: How is in the States?
Monadology: Hi, let's have have a good game.
C[Monadology: Well, the presidential candidates for the upcoming election are pretty dismal. How is Romania?
C[ardeleanul: Cold weather, a lot of rain, snow, winds...
C[ardeleanul: I like Trump more than others
ardeleanul: He is sincere, at least
C[Monadology: I do not see Trump as sincere at all, but I don't think that is a productive discussion to have
C[ardeleanul: Ok you know more you live there...
ardeleanul: But here in Europe they are maybe different analysed
C[Monadology: That might very well account for the difference, but I think a lot of people in the US also think Trump is very sincere
C[ardeleanul: I mean when he told he don,t like emigrants is sincere, we are not allowed to say that here...
ardeleanul: And Europe is changing rapidly and badly...

C[Monadology: I can see why you might admire his directness about that issue then. I don't think the situation in the US is parallel to the situation in Europe, though. Hence, what Trump has said to justify his views on immigration strikes me as a distortion of the facts (which is part of where the insincerity comes in)
Monadology: I also don't put much stock in national boundaries, but that's a separate issue that doesn't bear on Trump's sincerity
C[ardeleanul: This year the weather was very cold and rainy here, i hope this will not be forever...
ardeleanul: My bees are not producing honey at all until now
Monadology: That's a shame. It's unusually cool this Spring here as well, but I am in Southern California, so it is actually something of a good thing as it is normally very hot
Monadology: I hope things warm up there soon
C[ardeleanul: Usually in May we eat cherries, now they are green to yellw, also the pools are opening and in the night are around 15 deg celsius, now we have 5, close to freeze
C[ardeleanul: Where are you, at the ocean?
C[Monadology: I am quite a bit Inland, so the coast is a couple hours away.
C[ardeleanul: i like to go to Grece in summers
C[ardeleanul: is quiet and wild enough to feel free...

C[Monadology: Hi, let's have a good game
murakoshi:  Sunjang Baduk Tournament 4th Season (Group C5) (9609) R:1 (murakoshi vs Monadology)
Monadology: Thanks, this was a very enjoyable and interesting game
murakoshi: it was interesting to see so much played on the 4th lines.
Monadology: I had thought that in this kind of Go, focusing on the weak stones is most important (the isolated ones like at N4)
Monadology: but I always run mine to the center rather than form bases like you did with D7
Monadology: I didn't even think of that in any of my games
murakoshi: I'm not sure how secure the two knights moves are, but it forms the start of a base.
murakoshi: I think the downside is that by doing it, it strengthens the stones adjacent to it.
